requirement: Buyer can create and manage sourcing events (RFI, RFQ, RFP, Auctions) in Coupa.
Supplier can participate in sourcing events via email and the Coupa Supplier Portal (CSP).
Sourcing events can be configured with timelines, evaluations, scoring, and award decisions in Coupa.
Approval workflows aligned with Limits of Authority (DOA / LOA) are implemented in Coupa.
Savings tracking (planned, negotiated, cost avoidance) is implemented in Coupa.
Reporting capabilities offer actionable insights into sourcing events, supplier performance, and spend data in Coupa.
Roles and responsibilities are clearly defined and implemented in Coupa.
Category Managers/Procurement team can initiate and manage strategic sourcing activities for centre-managed commodities and services.
Buyers can create purchase requests that can be 'flipped' into sourcing events to streamline supplier engagement and ensure competitive pricing.
Users can conduct RFx (RFI, RFP, RFQ) and auctions (English reverse auction, Dutch reverse auction, Japanese reverse auction) in the Coupa sourcing module.

Users can leverage auctions as a streamlined approach to direct negotiations, particularly effective when suppliers are well-known or when the sourcing event involves a limited number of items without complex pricing structures.
Users can define savings in the sourcing module to enable cost-saving opportunities and foster transparency throughout the supplier selection process.
Coupa Admins can customize sourcing settings and configurations to enable certain controls at the Procurement Admin (Buyer) side.
